personas.subtitle: Unframed default reasoning stance
personas.when_to_use: Use as the reference condition for study comparisons.

personas.subtitle: Strongest-objection framing
personas.when_to_use: Use when you want pressure against premature conclusions.
personas.risk_note: Caution: may bias toward guarded or underconfident answers.

personas.subtitle: Explicit assumptions and structural rigor
personas.when_to_use: Use when assumptions, constraints, and key distinctions must stay explicit.
personas.risk_note: Caution: may add structure without improving correctness.

personas.subtitle: Multiple plausible approaches before committing
personas.when_to_use: Use when comparing multiple plausible paths matters before narrowing.
personas.risk_note: Caution: may broaden reasoning without improving decisional usefulness.

personas.subtitle: Clear commitment under stated assumptions
personas.when_to_use: Use when the study needs commitment pressure toward a single recommendation.
personas.risk_note: Caution: may increase commitment without proportional evidential support.
